executive_summary: Summit Outdoor Gear's current e-commerce platform is leaving revenue on the table. Site analytics show a 72% cart abandonment rate (vs. 65% industry average), mobile conversion at 0.8% (vs. 2.1% benchmark), and an average page load time of 4.2 seconds. This proposal outlines a 14-week engagement to redesign the e-commerce experience, optimize the conversion funnel, and implement performance improvements that we project will increase online revenue by 35-45% within 6 months of launch.
scope: Full redesign of the Summit Outdoor Gear e-commerce experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile breakpoints. Scope includes UX research (customer interviews, heatmap analysis, competitive audit), information architecture restructuring, UI design for all core user flows (browse, search, product detail, cart, checkout, account), front-end development of the new design on your existing Shopify Plus platform, integration with existing ERP and inventory systems, and 30 days of post-launch optimization.
out_of_scope: Backend ERP or inventory management system changes
Product photography or copywriting for product descriptions
Physical retail or POS system changes
SEO content strategy (available as a separate engagement)
approach: We follow a research-first methodology that de-risks the design process. Week 1-3 is pure discovery: we interview 12-15 customers, analyze 90 days of behavioral data, and audit the competitive landscape. This produces a data-backed brief that drives all design decisions. Design happens in rapid 2-week sprints with stakeholder review gates between each sprint. Development runs one sprint behind design, so we maintain continuous forward progress. We launch with a 50/50 A/B test against the current site to validate performance improvements before full cutover.

deliverables.name: UX Research Report
deliverables.description: Customer interview synthesis, heatmap analysis, competitive audit findings, and prioritized opportunity map

deliverables.name: Information Architecture
deliverables.description: Revised site map, navigation structure, category taxonomy, and search strategy

deliverables.name: UI Design System
deliverables.description: Complete component library with responsive design tokens, interaction patterns, and accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA)

deliverables.name: High-Fidelity Prototypes
deliverables.description: Interactive prototypes for all core user flows across desktop, tablet, and mobile

deliverables.name: Shopify Plus Implementation
deliverables.description: Production-ready front-end implementation with all integrations tested and deployed to staging

deliverables.name: A/B Test Results & Optimization Report
deliverables.description: 30-day post-launch performance analysis with conversion data, revenue impact, and optimization recommendations

tiers.name: Essential
tiers.description: UX research, UI redesign, and Shopify Plus implementation for core user flows (browse, product, cart, checkout). Does not include post-launch optimization.

tiers.name: Complete
tiers.description: Full scope including research, design system, implementation, A/B testing, and 30-day post-launch optimization. Includes all 6 deliverables.

tiers.name: Complete + SEO
tiers.description: Everything in Complete plus SEO content strategy, technical SEO audit and implementation, and 3 months of organic search performance monitoring.

timeline.description: Customer interviews, behavioral data analysis, competitive audit, opportunity mapping. Deliverable: UX Research Report.
Information architecture, design system creation, high-fidelity prototypes. Two design sprints with stakeholder review gates. Deliverables: IA documentation, design system, interactive prototypes.
Shopify Plus front-end implementation, ERP/inventory integration, QA testing, staging deployment. Deliverable: Production-ready Shopify theme.
50/50 A/B test launch, performance monitoring, conversion optimization, final analysis. Deliverable: A/B test results and optimization report.

terms: This proposal is valid for 30 calendar days from the date shown above.
All prices are in USD and exclusive of applicable sales tax.
Payment terms: Net 15 from invoice date. Late payments subject to 1.5% monthly interest.
Client will provide timely access to stakeholders, analytics platforms, and Shopify Plus admin as needed.
Design revisions are included within sprint review cycles. Additional revision rounds beyond the agreed sprint structure are billed at $250/hour.
Redline Digital retains the right to feature this project in our portfolio with client approval.
Either party may terminate with 14 days written notice. Client is responsible for payment of all work completed through the termination date.
All deliverables become client property upon full payment.
